title: epilobium lineare var. oliganthum
intro: Epilobium lineare var. oliganthum, also known as small-flowered willowherb, is a plant species belonging to the family Onagraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it beneficial for various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects, providing health benefits such as wound healing, antimicrobial activity, and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Epilobium lineare var. oliganthum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal medicine.
